Based on a comparative study of the Income-tax Act, 1961 (as amended by the Finance Act, 2026) and the Income-tax Act, 2025 (as amended by the Finance Act, 2026), effective 01-04-2026. For professional reference only; verify against the bare Acts before relying in proceedings.
